title: Double Suicide: Japanese Summer
writer: Mamoru Sasaki, Tsutomu Tamura, Nagisa Ôshima
actors: Kei Satô, Keiko Sakurai, Rokkô Toura
plot: Over the course of a night, a sex-obsessed young woman, a suicidal man, and a gun-crazy wannabe gangster are taken prisoner of a gang awaiting a shootout between a rival gang at dawn.
